The '''''Fond Memory''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] in the service of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] around [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. Several months after the [[Battle of Helska IV]] it ferried [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Elegos A'Kla]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] and [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
